description_long: This armchair features a striking and unusual design, with its frame and armrests constructed from what appear to be curved, polished animal horns, giving it a wild and organic aesthetic. The seat and backrest are covered in a dark, mottled fur or hide, adding to its exotic and primal appearance. The armrests and backrest are formed by intertwining horn-like structures that curve and twist, creating a sense of movement and complexity. The legs are also made from the same horn material, each one uniquely shaped and angled, contributing to the chair's sculptural quality. The overall color palette is dominated by deep browns, blacks, and subtle amber tones, enhancing the naturalistic feel. This piece would serve as a dramatic focal point in any urban setting, blending art and function.
description: A dramatic armchair with intertwining horn-like arms and legs, and a seat covered in dark, mottled fur or hide. Its organic, sculptural form and rich brown-black tones create a wild, exotic presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical, intertwining horn arms and the rounded, fur-covered seat.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sweeping curves of the horn armrest and the textured seat surface.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the complex, layered horn backrest and the rounded back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the dynamic, twisting horn structure and the fur texture on the seat.
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, open and sculptural with layered horn curves
